induced_prompt_raw: Generate a sentence with exactly one embedded relative clause, using the structure: [Noun Phrase 1] + [Noun Phrase 2] + [Transitive Verb] + [Intransitive Verb] (e.g., "The [noun] the [noun] [verb] [verb]"). Avoid nesting a third noun phrase or creating double-embedded clauses.
